betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Wireless Transceiver§f is a §6single block§f infrastructure tile that provides §6bidirectional wireless power and data transmission§f between two paired transceivers. Unlike the §6Microwave Receiver§f (10084) which only receives power, the transceiver can both §6send and receive§f RF, and it can also transmit §6Data Units§f (advancedrocketry:dataunit) in parallel.

§6Production Path (wirelesstransciever.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  g g g
  . d .
  g g g
  ```
- Key: `g`=§6paneGlassColorless§f (forge:ore_dict), `d`=§6advancedrocketry:dataunit:0§f
- Output: 4x §6Wireless Transceiver§f (advancedrocketry:wirelesstransciever)
- Range: 512 blocks line-of-sight per pair
- Power: bidirectional, up to 5,000 RF/t each direction

The transceiver uses §6glass panes§f as the §6focusing medium§f — the §6Data Unit§f in the center is the §6signal processor§f. Two transceivers are paired via a §6Linker§f (10088). Each pair can transmit RF and Data Units in parallel. Multiple transceivers can be linked in a §6mesh network§f for redundancy.

The wireless transceiver is a prerequisite for the §6Advanced Rocketry ID Chips§f (10086) and the §6Interstellar Mission§f (chain). It is the §6core component§f of every AR logistics network because it eliminates the need for §6physical power cables§f and §6data buses§f.

§eTip§f: Build transceivers in pairs — one at the §6power source§f and one at the §6destination§f. For long-distance (>512 blocks) transmission, use a §6chain of 3 transceivers§f with the middle one acting as a §6repeater§f. The glass panes must be §6colorless§f (no dye) for the signal to focus properly.
